33102786.name: llamacppqwen35iq4one
33102786.description: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B IQ4_XS via llama.cpp — long context, optimized for Olares One
33102786.title: Qwen3.5 35B IQ4 128K One
33102786.fullDescription:
Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (MoE, 3B active) served via llama.cpp — long context optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Unsloth Dynamic IQ4_XS quantization (17.5GB) — 6.5GB free for KV cache.
128K context window (vs 32K for the Q4_K_XL variant).
Compact 4-bit quant with imatrix optimization, slight quality tradeoff for much longer context.
Flash attention, CUDA graph optimization, and op-offload enabled.
llama.cpp b8369 with Gated Delta Net op.
Downloads the GGUF model on first launch (~17.5GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.
33102786.upgradeDescription: v1.0.3: llama.cpp b8667 → b8667 (Hadamard rotation). KV cache q4_0 (with Hadamard rotation) → q4_0 (2x compression).

f9902972.name: cascade230a3bone
f9902972.description: Nemotron Cascade 2 30B-A3B via llama.cpp — math and code, optimized for Olares One
f9902972.title: Cascade 2 30B-A3B One
f9902972.fullDescription:
Nemotron Cascade 2 30B-A3B (Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE, 3B active) served via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Q4_K_S quantization (22.5GB model, bartowski imatrix). 64K context (only 6 attention layers = tiny KV cache).
Gold medal IMO 2025, IOI 2025, ICPC World Finals 2025.
Dominates in math, code reasoning, and instruction following.
Hybrid architecture: 23 Mamba-2 layers + 6 GQA attention layers + MoE FFN.
Downloads the GGUF model on first launch (~22.5GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.
f9902972.upgradeDescription: v1.0.2: llama.cpp b8667 → b8667 (Hadamard rotation). KV cache q4_0 (with Hadamard rotation) → q4_0 (2x compression).

8a7e4366.name: devstralsmallone
8a7e4366.description: Devstral Small 2507 via llama.cpp — coding agent optimized for Olares One
8a7e4366.title: Devstral Small Code One
8a7e4366.fullDescription:
Devstral Small 2507 (24B dense) served via llama.cpp — coding agent optimized for Olares One.
#1 open-source on SWE-Bench Verified (53.6%) — outperforms models 10x larger.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Unsloth Dynamic Q5_K_XL quantization (16.8GB) — room for 32K+ context.
Based on Mistral-Small-3.1, fine-tuned for agentic software engineering.
Tool calling support with Mistral format.
llama.cpp b8334 with flash attention and CUDA graph optimization.
Downloads the GGUF model on first launch (~17GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

a4f8515c.name: gemma426ba4bone
a4f8515c.description: Gemma 4 26B-A4B (MoE + Vision) via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
a4f8515c.title: Gemma 4 26B-A4B One
a4f8515c.fullDescription:
Google Gemma 4 26B-A4B (MoE, 3.8B active, 128 experts) with native vision — served via llama.cpp, optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Unsloth Dynamic Q4_K_XL quantization (16GB model + 1.1GB vision projector = ~17GB, ~7GB free for KV cache).
64K context with q4_0 KV cache and Hadamard rotation.
Native multimodal: text + image + video understanding (no separate mmproj download needed by user).
LMArena 1441 (vs Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 1400). AIME 2026 88.3%. LiveCodeBench 77.1%.
Apache 2.0 license. Thinking mode with tool calling support.
llama.cpp b8667 with flash attention, CUDA graph optimization, and op-offload.
Downloads model on first launch (~17GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

65b82978.title: Gemma 4 E2B Voice Brain One
65b82978.fullDescription:

RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Q8_0 quantization (4.7GB model, near-lossless quality). 8K context.

q4_0 KV cache with Hadamard rotation. llama.cpp b8720.
Apache 2.0 license.
Downloads model on first launch (~4.7GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

e74eca98.name: omnivoiceone
e74eca98.description: OmniVoice TTS (646 languages, voice cloning, 0.6B) — optimized for Olares One
e74eca98.title: OmniVoice TTS One
e74eca98.fullDescription:
OmniVoice TTS by k2-fsa — 646 languages, zero-shot voice cloning, 0.6B params.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Only ~2-4 GB VRAM — can run alongside LLM and STT for voice pipeline.
40x faster than real-time. Apache 2.0 license.

French, English, German, Spanish, Italian, + 641 more languages.
Voice cloning from reference audio. Voice design (gender, age, pitch, accent).
Downloads model on first launch (~2GB) and caches it.

49c5b493.name: qwen3ttstone
49c5b493.description: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B — text-to-speech with voice cloning, optimized for Olares One
49c5b493.title: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B (Olares One)
49c5b493.fullDescription:
Qwen3-TTS 1.7B CustomVoice served via Gradio — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
9 built-in premium voices with instruction control.
Zero-shot voice cloning from 3 seconds of reference audio.
10 languages: French, English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, German, Russian, Portuguese, Spanish, Italian.
Downloads the model on first launch (~4.5GB) and caches it.
Exposes a Gradio web UI on port 8000.

metadata.title: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B (Olares One)

be32d4df.name: vllmgemma4e4bone
be32d4df.description: Gemma 4 E4B (Vision + Audio) via vLLM — optimized for Olares One
be32d4df.title: Gemma 4 E4B Voice One
be32d4df.fullDescription:
Google Gemma 4 E4B (8B params, 4.5B effective) with native audio + vision input — served via vLLM, optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Native audio understanding: ask questions about audio, transcribe speech, summarize conversations.
Native vision: analyze images, read documents, understand screenshots.
BF16 precision (~10GB VRAM with audio encoder). 8K context.
gpu-memory-utilization 0.45 (~10GB) — leaves room for TTS alongside.
OpenAI-compatible API with audio_url support in chat completions.
Apache 2.0 license. Thinking mode with tool calling.
Downloads model on first launch (~10GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

metadata.title: Gemma 4 E4B Voice One
metadata.description: Gemma 4 E4B (Vision + Audio) via vLLM — optimized for Olares One

spec.fullDescription:
Google Gemma 4 E4B (8B params, 4.5B effective) with native audio + vision input — served via vLLM, optimized for Olares One.
Native audio understanding and vision. OpenAI-compatible API with audio_url support.
~10GB VRAM — designed to run alongside Voxtral TTS for a complete voice pipeline.
Apache 2.0 license.

285e9d99.name: vllmqwen3527bone
285e9d99.description: Qwen3.5 27B NVFP4 via vLLM — optimized for Olares One
285e9d99.title: Qwen3.5 27B NVFP4 vLLM One
285e9d99.fullDescription:
Qwen3.5 27B (dense, Mamba-hybrid) served via vLLM with NVFP4 quantization — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
NVFP4 (NVIDIA FP4) native Blackwell quantization — 19.7GB model weights.
Requires SM 12.0 (Blackwell architecture) for FP4 tensor core instructions.
Uses vLLM cu130-nightly with native NVFP4 Marlin backend.
Downloads the model from HuggingFace on first launch (~20GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

af406293.name: vllmvoxtral3bone
af406293.description: Voxtral Mini 3B ASR via vLLM — audio transcription and understanding, optimized for Olares One
af406293.title: Voxtral Mini 3B ASR One
af406293.fullDescription:
Mistral Voxtral Mini 3B (audio encoder + Ministral-3B LLM) served via vLLM — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
BF16 precision (~9.5GB VRAM). 32K context. Up to 30 min audio transcription.
2.7x faster than Whisper Large V3. 3.2% WER English.
OpenAI-compatible API: /v1/audio/transcriptions + /v1/chat/completions with audio input.
Apache 2.0 license.
Downloads model on first launch (~9GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

13db403f.name: vllmvoxtralrt4bone
13db403f.description: Voxtral Realtime 4B streaming ASR via vLLM — real-time speech transcription, optimized for Olares One
13db403f.title: Voxtral Realtime 4B One
13db403f.fullDescription:
Mistral Voxtral Mini 4B Realtime (streaming ASR) served via vLLM — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
BF16 precision (~16GB VRAM). Streaming WebSocket endpoint /v1/realtime.
Causal audio encoder for infinite-length real-time transcription.
Configurable latency (80ms-2400ms). 13 languages. 8.7% FLEURS WER.
PIECEWISE cudagraph compilation for optimized inference.
Apache 2.0 license.
Downloads model on first launch (~9GB) and caches it.
Exposes WebSocket /v1/realtime + OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

efd72908.name: vllmvoxtraltts4bone
efd72908.description: Voxtral 4B TTS via vLLM-Omni — text-to-speech with 20 voices, optimized for Olares One
efd72908.title: Voxtral 4B TTS One
efd72908.fullDescription:
Mistral Voxtral 4B TTS served via vLLM-Omni — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
BF16 precision (~8GB VRAM). 24 kHz audio output. 70ms latency.
20 preset voices (10 languages: EN, FR, ES, DE, IT, PT, NL, AR, HI).
OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/speech endpoint.
68.4% win rate vs ElevenLabs Flash v2.5 in human preference tests.
CC BY-NC 4.0 license (non-commercial use).
Downloads model on first launch (~8GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.
